name: custom_label_3
description: Generate Google g:custom_label_3 from the second priority menu item split by backslash delimiters.
description_pl: Generuje Google g:custom_label_3 z drugiej pozycji menu priorytetowego, dzielonej po ukośnikach wstecznych.
notes: Extracts the second segment from priority menu items and tokenizes it for custom_label_3.
